mapper.insert: insert into community_repair_order ( repair_id, user_id, user_name, user_room, user_phone, repair_type, repair_address, repair_desc, repair_images, order_status, create_time, update_time, remark ) values ( 1, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userRoom}, #{userPhone}, #{repairType}, #{repairAddress}, #{repairDesc}, #{repairImages}, #{orderStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: select * from community_repair_order where order_status = 'pending' order by create_time desc
